case_title: SERVELINA CONDE SERVILLON VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM H. LARRY ELAM. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,108.00 FILED BY SERVILLON, SERVELINA CONDE AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
